title: Orchestrator Task Result
description: Structured result emitted by an agent and written into the envelope result field.

ok.description: true if the task succeeded; false if it failed or produced findings that block progress.

summary.description: Human-readable one- or two-sentence summary of what the agent did and what it found.
examples: All 3 repos pinned to python-ci@v1.0.4; no drift detected.

details.description: Agent-specific structured detail payload (arbitrary key-value pairs).

artifacts.description: Artifacts produced by this task (PRs opened, reports uploaded, etc.).

remediations.description: Ordered list of required remediation steps when ok=false.

escalate.description: When true the reducer must open a human-gate before the run can continue.

pass_rate_delta.description: For CI agent: fractional change in passing checks (e.g. 0.25 = 25pp improvement).

prs_opened.description: URLs of pull requests opened by this task.
